def get_top_scorer(students):
    ranked = sorted(students, key=lambda s: s["score"], reverse=True)
    return ranked[0]

def get_cheapest_product(products):
    ordered = sorted(products, key=lambda p: p["price"])
    return ordered[0]

def find_latest_order(orders):
    by_date = sorted(orders, key=lambda o: o["created_at"], reverse=True)
    return by_date[0]

def get_worst_performer(employees):
    ranked = sorted(employees, key=lambda e: e["rating"])
    return ranked[0]

def get_five_recent_logs(logs):
    sorted_logs = sorted(logs, key=lambda l: l["timestamp"], reverse=True)
    return sorted_logs[:5]
